creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Created attachment 237767
updating devel/libgudev to release 237 & meson

libgudev is now available in release 237

The attached diff will convert the port build to use meson, also adding the following port options:
- DOCS
- VALA

For purpose of minimizing time in maintenance after updates at upstream, the DOCS section of the plist will be generated dynamically for all files installed under share/gtk-doc/html/libgudev
